text: I can't tell where mcdouga9@cartman.egr.msu.edu came from but mcdouga9@egr.msu.edu works. I approve of this change and will reply to the email I received at mcdouga9@egr.msu.edu as confirmation. (I've changed my bugzilla associated email address to ebay@looksharp.net in 2018). Thanks.
